executives.name: Christian Klein
executives.background: Christian Klein is CEO and a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE. He has been with SAP since 1999 and has held various positions, including Chief Operating Officer and Chief Controlling Officer.

executives.name: Dominik Asam
executives.background: Dominik Asam is CFO and a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE. Before joining SAP, he was CFO of Airbus and Infineon Technologies.

executives.name: Muhammad Alam
executives.background: Muhammad Alam is a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE, leading SAP Product Engineering. He joined SAP in 2022 from Microsoft.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Executive Board, SAP Product Engineering

executives.name: Juergen Mueller
executives.background: Juergen Mueller was the Chief Technology Officer and a member of the Executive Board. He left the company in September 2024.

executives.name: Thomas Saueressig
executives.background: Thomas Saueressig is a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE, leading Customer Services & Delivery. He has been with SAP since 2004.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Executive Board, Customer Services & Delivery
Member of the Executive Board, SAP Product Engineering

board_of_directors.name: Pekka Ala-Pietilä
board_of_directors.background: Pekka Ala-Pietilä is the Chairman of the Supervisory Board. He was formerly the President of Nokia Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Hasso Plattner
board_of_directors.background: Hasso Plattner is a co-founder of SAP and served as Chairman of the Supervisory Board until May 2024.

board_of_directors.name: Ajei Gopal
board_of_directors.background: Ajei Gopal is the President and CEO of ANSYS, Inc. and serves as an independent member of the SAP Supervisory Board.

board_of_directors.name: Punit Renjen
board_of_directors.background: Punit Renjen was the former CEO of Deloitte Global and was designated to succeed Hasso Plattner but stepped down before taking the role.

sources.source_description: SAP SE Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
